title: Iam Music Player Renewed
description: A renew of the Iam Music Player Mod
body:
# Iam Music Player Renewed

> ⚠️ **WARNING**
> IMPR is **UNCOMPATIBLE** with Android

**Iam Music Player Renewed** is an updated version of the original Iam Music Player mod. Unlike the original, it fixes issues such as restoring YouTube support and updating libraries to ensure compatibility. Additionally, features like the relay server and NetEase Cloud integration have been modified or removed due to changes in third-party services. It allows you to enjoy music in Minecraft with features like playlist creation, YouTube and SoundCloud streaming, and multiplayer sync.  
## Warning ⚠️ 
- **Both** incompatible with [Labelling Containers](https://modrinth.com/mod/labelling-containers)

## 🎵 Features  
- **Music Manager** – Manage your playlists and songs.  
- **Boombox** – A portable music player for playing tapes and streaming music.  
- **Cassette Deck** – Play and manage cassette tapes.  
- **Parabolic Antenna (Item)** – Listen to music without tapes.  
- **Antenna** – Enables YouTube livestream playback.  
- **Glass & Normal Tapes** – Each tape holds one song for custom collections.  

> *This is not the original mod. You can find the original version [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/iam-music-player).*  

## ❓ FAQ  

**Why should I use Iam Music Player Renewed?**  
The original mod uses an outdated library that no longer works with YouTube. Our version restores YouTube support and keeps the mod up to date.  

**Is the relay server working again?**  
Yes

**Why is NetEase Cloud not supported?**  
NetEase Cloud took down the library used for integration, so we had to remove it.  

---

Enjoy the music and happy listening! 🎶
